name: Currency window arithmetic identical across PCs (30/90-day buckets)
method: Insert 5 sorties at known day-offsets (1,10,25,60,120). Run the exact 30-day and 90-day count queries twice (simulating PC-A and PC-B's polling). Both counts must match each other AND match the fixture-derived expectations (3 in 30d, 4 in 90d).
